thought.text: I see the issue - the LLM is running but the trajectory data is sparse. The Pinecone data has step markers but not the actual trajectory content. Let me check what data we have locally in that JSON and also look at the actual Weave trace:

action.command: cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && cat pinecone_data.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Keys:', list(d.keys())); trials=[t for t in d if t.get('metadata',{}).get('task_name')=='lr-warmup-scheduler']; print(f'Found {len(trials)} lr-warmup-scheduler trials'); print('Sample text[:1000]:'); print(trials[0].get('text','')[:1000] if trials else 'none')"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && cat pinecone_data.json | python3 -c \"import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Keys:', list(d.keys())); trials=[t for t in d if t.get('metadata',{}).get('task_name')=='lr-warmup-scheduler']; print(f'Found {len(trials)} lr-warmup-scheduler trials'); print('Sample text[:1000]:'); print(trials[0].get('text','')[:1000] if trials else 'none')\"", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Check local pinecone_data.json for trajectory content"}

summary: Check local pinecone_data.json for trajectory content
